installCommand: sh -lc 'if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "rentease-client" package.json 2>/dev/null; then npm install; elif [ -f client/package.json ]; then npm install --prefix client; else npm install; fi'
buildCommand: sh -lc 'if [ -f package.json ] && grep -q "rentease-client" package.json 2>/dev/null; then npm run build && rm -rf ../build_output && mv dist ../build_output; elif [ -f client/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix client && rm -rf build_output && mv client/dist build_output; else npm run build --workspace client && rm -rf client/dist && mv client/dist build_output; fi'
